hmong.lightest_sleep_transition_from_wakeful: Kev pw tsaug zog sib sib zog nkaus — hloov ntawm kev tsim dheev. Qhov muag ntxeev qeeb qeeb, leeg nqaij nqig. Kev ras dheev thaum pw (myoclonic twitches) yog qhov muaj ntau. Yooj yim tsa dheev. Cov vertex sharp waves tshwm rau ntawm EEG.
hmong.true_sleep_begins_core_body_temperatur: Kev pw tsaug zog tiag pib. Lub cev qhov kub hauv nruab nrab poob, plawv dhia qeeb. Cov sleep spindles (thalamocortical discharges) tiv thaiv kev pw thiab ua kom nco cov kev txav ruaj. Cov K complexes yog cov nthwv dej loj uas teb rau cov kev txhib sab nraud.
hmong.deep_slow_wave_sleep_sws_most_restorat: Kev pw tob/slow-wave (SWS). Theem uas rov qab zoo tshaj plaws. Kev tso hormone kev loj hlob nce siab tshaj. Lub cev glymphatic ntxuav cov khib nyiab hauv hlwb (amyloid-β). Kev ua kom nco declarative tshwm ntawm no. Nyuab tshaj plaws los tsa dheev; muaj kev pw zog thaum tsim.
hmong.dreaming_stage_brain_is_highly_active_: Theem npau suav. Lub hlwb ua haujlwm heev (zoo li kev tsim dheev), tab sis lub cev tuag tes tuag taw (atonia vim brainstem txwv cov motor neurons). Qhov muag txav sai ua ke. Kev ua cov nco emotional thiab kev daws teeb meem tsim. Cov cycles ntev dua thoob hmo.
hmong.brodmann_areas_map_52_cytoarchitectura: Cov cheeb tsam Brodmann qhia 52 cheeb tsam cytoarchitectonic. Primary motor cortex (cheeb tsam 4), primary somatosensory (cheeb tsam 3,1,2), primary visual (cheeb tsam 17), primary auditory (cheeb tsam 41,42). Prefrontal cortex myelinates zaum kawg (~25 xyoo).
hmong.purkinje_cells_are_among_the_largest_n: Cov Purkinje cells yog ib qho ntawm cov neurons loj tshaj; txhua tus tau txais ~200,000 synaptic inputs. Cerebellum cortex muaj 3 txheej: molecular, Purkinje, thiab granular. Kev tshawb fawb tshiab qhia cov luag haujlwm hauv kev paub, kev xav, thiab lus.
hmong.contains_nuclei_for_cranial_nerves_iii: Muaj cov nuclei rau cov hlab ntsha taub hau III–XII. Reticular activating system (RAS) yog lub hlwb «lub switch qhib» — kev puas tsuaj ua rau coma. Pyramidal crossing hauv medulla: kev hla motor piav qhia txog kev tswj motor sab tim.
hmong.memory_replay_during_sleep_hippocampal: Kev rov ua nco thaum pw: cov neurons hippocampus «rov ua» cov kev paub nruab hnub thaum N3 pw, hloov cov nco mus rau neocortex. Cov grid cells hauv entorhinal cortex muab cov coordinates chaw rau cov place cells hippocampus.
hmong.fear_conditioning_pathway_auditory_cor: Txoj kev fear conditioning: auditory cortex → lateral amygdala → central amygdala → hypothalamus (kev teb rau kev nyuaj siab) + PAG (khov). Cov kev sib cuam tshuam amygdala-prefrontal ua kom tswj tau kev xav — lub hauv paus ntawm cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT).
hmong.key_nuclei_vpl_vpm_somatosensory_relay: Cov nuclei tseem ceeb: VPL/VPM (somatosensory relay), LGN (visual relay mus V1), MGN (auditory relay mus A1), pulvinar (kev mloog), anterior nucleus (nco, Papez circuit).
hmong.thermostat_analogy_anterior_hypothalam: Thermostat piv txwv: anterior hypothalamus pib kev txias (vasodilation, tawm hws); posterior hypothalamus pib kev sov (tshee, vasoconstriction). Kub taub hau = set point nce vim prostaglandins thaum kis kab mob.
hmong.split_brain_experiments_revealed_hemis: Cov kev sim split-brain qhia hemispheric specialization: sab laug hemisphere = lus, logic; sab xis hemisphere = spatial, holistic processing. Cov ntaub ntawv nthuav rau ib qho visual field raug ua los ntawm sab tim hemisphere.
hmong.dopamine_from_substantia_nigra_modulat: Dopamine los ntawm substantia nigra tswj txoj kev ncaj (D1, txhib) thiab txoj kev tsis ncaj (D2, txwv). Kev poob ntawm qhov kev tswj no hauv Parkinson ua rau muaj kev nyuaj tshwj xeeb los pib txav.

hmong.the_trachea_windpipe_is_reinforced_by_: Trachea raug txhawb los ntawm cov nplhaib cartilage C-shaped. Cov cilia txav mucus mus saum toj los ntes cov particles.
hmong.the_trachea_splits_into_left_and_right: Trachea faib mus rau sab laug thiab sab xis main bronchi, txhua tus nkag mus rau ib lub ntsws. Lawv ceg mus rau cov bronchioles me dua.

hmong.the_diaphragm_relaxes_and_rises_reduci: Diaphragm so thiab nce, txo lub ntsws volume. Cua muaj CO2 ntau raug thawb tawm los ntawm tib txoj kev rov qab.

hmong.swallowing_pushes_the_bolus_past_the_e: Kev nqos thawb lub bolus dhau epiglottis. Cov nthwv peristaltic txav nws mus rau hauv qab 25 cm esophagus hauv kwv yees 8 vib nas this.

hmong.no_system_works_alone_the_kidney_filte: Tsis muaj kab ke ua haujlwm ib leeg. Raum lim ntshav (cardiovascular), teb rau ADH (endocrine), thiab tso urea tawm (digestive byproduct). Nrhiav cov kev sib txuas.
hmong.ask_a_question_about_the_active_organ_: Nug ib lo lus nug txog lub organ los yog kab ke uas ua haujlwm. Tus xibfwb paub dab tsi nyob rau ntawm qhov screen thiab hloov cov lus teb kom haum rau koj qib.
hmong.click_the_named_structure_on_the_diagr: Nias qhov qauv uas muaj npe rau ntawm daim duab. Tsim qhov «taw rau yam khoom» reflex uas AP thiab kev sim kho mob vam khom.
hmong.follow_blood_air_food_or_signals_throu: Ua raws ntshav, cua, khoom noj, los yog cov teeb liab raws li hauv lub cev. Cov kev yog txoj hauv kev uas cov ntsiab lus sib cais los ua ib lub kab ke uas tuaj yeem xav txog.
hmong.quick_recall_cards_with_spaced_repetit: Cov npav nco sai nrog spaced repetition. Rov ua rau rau vib nas this tam sim no zoo dua li rov nyeem tsib feeb tag kis — qhov no yog testing effect.
hmong.adjust_the_sliders_to_keep_each_body_v: Kho cov sliders kom cia txhua lub cev variable nyob hauv nws txoj kab noj qab haus huv, thiab saib seb cov kab ke sib koom ua haujlwm li cas los tswj kev sib npaug.
hmong.reset_all_layers_to_default_skin_only: Rov pib txhua txheej rau default (tawv nqaij nkaus xwb)

hmong.skin_tone_representation: Nqaij daim tawv nqaij (kev sawv cev)

hmong.exception_the_pulmonary_artery_carries: Kev zam: hlab ntsha ntsws nqa cov ntshav tsis muaj oxygen (xiav), cov hlab ntsha rov qab ntsws nqa cov ntshav muaj oxygen (liab).

hmong.a_pin_is_placed_on_the_anatomical_figu: Ib tug pin raug muab tso rau ntawm daim duab anatomical. Txheeb xyuas qhov qauv sai li sai tau! Saib qhov crosshair uas dhia ntawm canvas.

hmong.real_human_ph_range_is_7_35_7_45_inves: Tib neeg qhov tseeb pH range yog 7.35-7.45. Tshawb xyuas vim li cas nws nqaim heev.
